<!-- Source: HLD §3.1 + §3.2 (C4 L2 containers), §2 (external providers). Components are real HLD containers only. -->

# Component Diagram — RAG Refinement System

```mermaid
graph TB
    SPA["Personal Tool SPA<br/>[React + Tailwind + Vite, ADR-9]"]
    ENT["Enterprise RAG client"]

    subgraph SYS["RAG Refinement System"]
        API["API Gateway<br/>[FastAPI async, ADR-5]"]
        ING["Ingestion Service<br/>[data-engineer]"]
        ROUTER["Router Node<br/>[LangGraph + Claude 3 Haiku, ADR-1/3]"]
        RET["Retrieve Nodes<br/>[targeted + fallback]"]
        RERANK["Rerank Node (optional)<br/>[Cohere Rerank-3, ADR-8]"]
        GEN["Generate Node<br/>[Claude / GPT-4o]"]
        TOCCACHE["TOC Cache (LRU)"]
        COMP["Compliance Handlers<br/>[erasure / access / no-retention]"]
    end

    PG[("PostgreSQL<br/>documents, sections")]
    QD[("Qdrant / ChromaDB<br/>chunk vectors")]
    OBJ[("Object Storage<br/>raw uploads")]

    ANTH["Anthropic API<br/>Claude 3 Haiku + Claude"]
    OAI["OpenAI API<br/>embeddings + GPT-4o"]
    COH["Cohere API<br/>Rerank-3"]
    AZ["Azure Document Intelligence<br/>OCR"]
    LS["LangSmith"]

    SPA -->|"POST /v1/answer (JWT, SSE)"| API
    ENT -->|"POST /v1/route (API key)"| API
    API --> ING
    API --> ROUTER
    API --> COMP
    ING --> AZ
    ING --> OAI
    ING --> PG
    ING --> QD
    ING --> OBJ
    ROUTER --> ANTH
    ROUTER --> TOCCACHE
    TOCCACHE --> PG
    ROUTER --> RET
    RET --> QD
    RET --> RERANK
    RERANK --> COH
    RERANK --> GEN
    GEN --> ANTH
    GEN --> OAI
    COMP --> PG
    COMP --> QD
    COMP --> OBJ
    ROUTER -.-> LS
    GEN -.-> LS
```

> Invariant: the Router Node never calls the Generate Node for `/v1/route` (HLD §3.2, §7.2). All external providers are exactly those in HLD §2.
